title: ThermoSafe – Heat Risk ☀️

day_mild: Take breaks in the shade every hour.
day_moderate: Avoid intense physical effort at midday.
day_high: Avoid working in direct sunlight if possible.
Wear light clothing, a hat, and stay hydrated.
Notify supervisors if you feel dizzy or get cramps.
day_extreme: Stop work if possible and find a cool place.
Stay hydrated constantly, even if not thirsty.
Seek help if experiencing disorientation or dry skin.
Call emergency services if severe symptoms appear.
night_safe: Safe night conditions. Ensure good ventilation.
night_moderate: Warm night: ventilate the space well.
night_extreme: 🌡️ Torrid night: avoid activity and rest in a cool space.
night_water: Drink water before going to sleep.
night_heavy_meal: Avoid heavy meals and drink water regularly.
night_emergency: Avoid exertion. If symptoms appear, seek medical help immediately.
